channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: CENTCOM releases video of air strikes in fifth week of war on Iran
item.description: US Central Command has released footage of strikes in Iran appearing to show the targeting of drones and tanks.

item.title: Can Starmer’s 40-nation coalition open the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: About 20 percent of global oil and gas passes through the Gulf waterway.

item.title: Burkina Faso military, allies committing ‘horrific’ civilian abuses: HRW
item.description: More than 1,800 civilians have been killed by the army and armed groups since 2023, Human Rights Watch says.

item.title: UK-led coalition of 40 countries vows action on Hormuz Strait gridlock
item.description: UK PM Keir Starmer urges non-military solutions ahead of coalition meeting to ease gridlock in vital Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Pakistan to continue with Iran-US mediation despite ‘obstacles’
item.description: Islamabad's statement follows Trump threatening to bomb Iran 'back to the Stone Ages'.

item.title: Smoke rises over Mashhad, Iran, following strike near airport
item.description: Footage shows columns of smoke rising over the Iranian city of Mashhad, after US-Israeli strikes near the airport.

item.title: Pakistan-bound ships pass through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Two ships have passed through the Strait of Hormuz and arrived at Karachi Port.

item.title: Four children killed in nursery school stabbing attack in Uganda
item.description: Police say a suspect is in custody but the motive remains unknown after attack in Ugandan capital, Kampala.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill 7 in southern Lebanon, Hezbollah targets ground troops
item.description: Lebanon's prime minister warns of a 'critical' situation as Israel says it is working to dismantle Hezbollah.

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis coordinate with Iran, but retain independence, despite war
item.description: Houthi actions align with Iran’s strategy, but maintain autonomy to maximise regional influence and domestic objectives.
